steps.name: Token foundation
steps.description: Create the design-token SSOT and motion constants. Write src/styles/design-tokens.css with all CSS custom properties (color, spacing, radius, motion). Write src/styles/tokens.ts exporting TRANSITION_DURATION=150 and ANIMATION_DURATION=220. Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) and @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) blocks. Import design-tokens.css in src/main.tsx before any component CSS.
steps.criteria: TRANSITION_DURATION exported from tokens.ts equals 150. ANIMATION_DURATION exported from tokens.ts equals 220. design-tokens.css defines all color, spacing, radius, and motion custom properties. @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) block present in design-tokens.css. @media (prefers-color-scheme: light) block present in design-tokens.css. src/main.tsx imports design-tokens.css.
steps.implementation_notes: Dark base: #1A1A1F, light base: #F5F5F7. Accent: #00B8D4 (same both themes). Danger: #EF5350 dark / #D32F2F light. Success: #00C896 dark / #00A87A light. Offline: #8A8A9A. All spacing multiples of 4px. Radius: card 12px, button 8px, chip 99px. tokens.ts exports only the two motion constants — design-tokens.css is the SSOT for everything else.

steps.name: Auth screen
steps.description: Create src/styles/auth.css using BEM naming. Apply BEM classNames to AuthScreen.tsx. Full-viewport centered card layout. Submit button uses --accent token. BEM blocks: auth (root), auth__card, auth__title, auth__input, auth__button, auth__error.
steps.criteria: AuthScreen root element renders with className containing 'auth'. AuthScreen card container renders with className containing 'auth__card'. AuthScreen submit button renders with className containing 'auth__button'. AuthScreen error element renders with className containing 'auth__error' when an error is present. auth.css uses only CSS custom properties for color values.
steps.implementation_notes: Card max-width 400px, centered via flexbox on viewport root. Full-width inputs and button. Primary button background: var(--accent). Import auth.css inside AuthScreen.tsx.

steps.name: Greeting + Home screen + bottom nav
steps.description: Create src/lib/greeting.ts as a pure function (hour: number) => string. Create src/styles/home.css. Update HomeScreen.tsx: call greeting(), display sync badge from syncStatusStore, apply BEM classNames, implement fixed bottom nav bar with env(safe-area-inset-bottom). BEM blocks: home, home__header, home__greeting, home__sync-badge, home__nav, home__nav-item.
steps.criteria: greeting(6) returns 'Good morning'. greeting(13) returns 'Good afternoon'. greeting(20) returns 'Good evening'. greeting(0) returns 'Good morning'. greeting(11) returns 'Good morning'. greeting(12) returns 'Good afternoon'. greeting(17) returns 'Good afternoon'. greeting(18) returns 'Good evening'. HomeScreen root renders with className containing 'home'. HomeScreen bottom nav renders with className containing 'home__nav'. Sync badge renders with className containing 'home__sync-badge' when pendingCount > 0.
steps.implementation_notes: Bottom nav: position fixed, bottom 0, padding-bottom env(safe-area-inset-bottom), background var(--bg-surface), border-top 1px solid var(--border). Greeting ranges: 0-11 morning, 12-17 afternoon, 18-23 evening. Sync badge: show when pendingCount > 0, use var(--danger) color when syncStatus === 'error'. Greeting computed via new Date().getHours() at render time — no state.

steps.name: Session screen
steps.description: Create src/styles/session.css with BEM classes. Update SessionScreen.tsx with BEM classNames. Exercise rows have completion state modifier. BEM blocks: session, session__exercise, session__sets, session__reps, session__complete-btn, session__exercise--done.
steps.criteria: SessionScreen root element renders with className containing 'session'. Each exercise row renders with className containing 'session__exercise'. Complete button renders with className containing 'session__complete-btn'. A completed exercise row renders with className containing 'session__exercise--done'. session.css uses only CSS custom properties for color values.
steps.implementation_notes: Exercise rows: vertical list, 16px gap. Complete button: circular, 44px min touch target. Completed --done modifier: strikethrough on exercise name, var(--text-muted) color. Do NOT add checkmark animation here — that is step 02-01.

steps.name: Rest Timer
steps.description: Create src/styles/timer.css with BEM classes and @keyframes timerSlideIn. Update RestTimer.tsx with BEM classNames. Timer display is 56px, tabular-nums, weight 700. Root animates in via timerSlideIn on mount. BEM blocks: timer, timer__display, timer__controls, timer--active.
steps.criteria: RestTimer root element renders with className containing 'timer'. RestTimer countdown display renders with className containing 'timer__display'. timer.css defines @keyframes timerSlideIn. timer__display class sets font-size via the 56px token. RestTimer renders with className containing 'timer--active' when running.
steps.implementation_notes: timerSlideIn: translateY(24px) opacity 0 -> translateY(0) opacity 1, duration var(--animation-duration). font-feature-settings: 'tnum' on timer__display. Reduced-motion: animation-duration 0ms override in @media block. 56px must be applied via className (not inline style) so it is testable.

steps.name: Readiness Card
steps.description: Create src/styles/readiness.css. ReadinessCard already has BEM class names in JSX — add CSS only and verify existing modifiers match. State modifiers: readiness-card--ready (teal), readiness-card--not-yet (muted), readiness-card--review (amber).
steps.criteria: ReadinessCard root element renders with className containing 'readiness-card'. ReadinessCard renders with className containing 'readiness-card--ready' when state is READY. ReadinessCard renders with className containing 'readiness-card--not-yet' when state is NOT_YET. readiness.css uses only CSS custom properties for color values.
steps.implementation_notes: ReadinessCard.tsx already uses BEM modifiers (readiness-card--offline, readiness-card--ready, etc.) — verify these match CSS. READY: var(--accent) border/accent. NOT_YET: var(--text-secondary) accent. REVIEW: amber #F5A623. Offline: var(--offline) color. Add progress bar element if missing for streak display.

steps.name: Checkmark microinteraction
steps.description: Add @keyframes checkmarkPop to session.css. Update SessionScreen.tsx to apply session__complete-btn--animated class for TRANSITION_DURATION ms after completing an exercise, using TRANSITION_DURATION from tokens.ts for the setTimeout duration.
steps.criteria: session.css defines @keyframes checkmarkPop. A newly completed exercise button renders with className containing 'session__complete-btn--animated' immediately after the complete action. TRANSITION_DURATION from tokens.ts is 150. @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) sets checkmarkPop animation-duration to 0ms.
steps.implementation_notes: checkmarkPop: scale(1) -> scale(1.3) -> scale(1), 150ms total. Transient animatingId state in SessionScreen: set on complete, cleared via setTimeout(fn, TRANSITION_DURATION). Import TRANSITION_DURATION from tokens.ts for the setTimeout call — this makes the timing value testable via the tokens.ts unit test.

steps.name: History + Chain screens
steps.description: Create src/styles/history.css and src/styles/chain.css. Update ExerciseHistory.tsx and ProgressionChain.tsx with BEM classNames and add isOffline: boolean prop to both. Render an offline banner when isOffline is true. BEM blocks: exercise-history, exercise-history__offline-banner; progression-chain, progression-chain__offline-banner.
steps.criteria: ExerciseHistory root renders with className containing 'exercise-history'. ExerciseHistory renders 'exercise-history__offline-banner' when isOffline is true. ExerciseHistory does not render 'exercise-history__offline-banner' when isOffline is false. ProgressionChain root renders with className containing 'progression-chain'. ProgressionChain renders 'progression-chain__offline-banner' when isOffline is true. ProgressionChain does not render 'progression-chain__offline-banner' when isOffline is false. history.css and chain.css use only CSS custom properties for color values.
steps.implementation_notes: Offline banner: 'You are offline — data may be outdated'. Background: var(--danger) at 15% opacity. Full-width, 12px padding. Update call sites in main.tsx HistoryPage and ChainPage wrappers to pass isOffline derived from navigator.onLine.
